title: Call to Battle 3 - World War 2 (by Stoondler45)
description: WW2 Call to Battle 3 takes players' mod back to World War II, with more detail and an expanded arsenal.
body:
Call to Battle 3 - WW2 (by Stoondler45) by Stoondler45: Immersion in the World War II Era

This modpack, created by Stoondler45, takes players to the heart of World War II, recreating the atmosphere of those years with stunning detail. From the uniforms of soldiers to the thundering equipment, every element of the mod is designed to immerse you in the historical context as much as possible.

The arsenal has been expanded with many types of weapons used by the warring parties. Rifles, machine guns, grenades and explosives are all available for use in battle, allowing players to feel the firepower of the era.

The equipment is represented by a wide range of combat vehicles. Players will be able to control this equipment, participating in large-scale tank battles and air battles.

Players will be able to experience themselves as soldiers fighting for Stalingrad, Normandy or other iconic places. Call to Battle is an opportunity to relive history, to feel like a participant in the greatest conflict in the history of mankind.
